case_title: LENTON, CASEY VS TAQUERIA SAN JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,320.00 FILED BY LENTON, CASEY AS TO DEFENDANT TAQUERIA SAN JOSE VALLE, DAVID: OWNER/OPERATOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TAQUERIA SAN JOSE VALLE, DAVID: OWNER/OPERATOR
